title: [LowerToHW] Wrap aynsc reset initiliazation by ifdef

features.name: async reset initialization in initial block
features.description: Code should include an initial block with a conditional assignment guarded by an if (reset) condition for asynchronous reset initialization

features.name: ifdef guarded random initialization block
features.description: Code should include an ifdef wrapper around random initialization constructs like RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT with assignments to registers
